_comment_signTimeoutMs: Timeout in ms waiting for Desktop Wallet to sign a transaction (env: CLAW_AGENT_SIGN_TIMEOUT_MS)
_comment_reconnectBaseMs: Base delay in ms before first reconnect attempt (env: CLAW_AGENT_RECONNECT_BASE_MS)
_comment_reconnectMaxMs: Maximum reconnect delay in ms, caps exponential backoff (env: CLAW_AGENT_RECONNECT_MAX_MS)
_comment_policy: Default policy parameters for transaction approval

policy._comment_perTxLimitUsd: Maximum USD value per single transaction before requiring manual approval
policy._comment_dailyLimitUsd: Maximum total USD value of transactions per day
policy._comment_mode: Policy mode: "supervised" requires whitelist, "autonomous" allows any address within limits
